nasb.text: the sons of Gad and the sons of Reuben came and spoke to Moses and to Eleazar the priest and to the leaders of the congregation, saying,

esv.text: So the people of Gad and the people of Reuben came and said to Moses and to Eleazar the priest and to the chiefs of the congregation,

cnv.text: 就來對摩西和以利亞撒祭司，以及會眾的首領說：

ccb.text: 就来见摩西、以利亚撒祭司和会众的首领，说：
